description_long: This is a two-story suburban house with a gable roof and a prominent front porch supported by columns. The facade features a mix of large and small windows, including a set of tall windows on the right and symmetrical windows above the entryway. The property includes a driveway with a parked car, a garage, and landscaped front and back yards with several trees and shrubs. The backyard is equipped with a swimming pool, lounge chairs, and a patio area, providing ample outdoor living space. The house exterior is primarily white with dark roofing and trim, and the overall design blends traditional and modern elements. The structure appears spacious, with multiple entry points and a balcony overlooking the backyard.
description: A spacious two-story white house with a gable roof, front porch, garage, landscaped yards, and a backyard pool. Features large windows, a balcony, and both traditional and modern design elements.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, porch with columns, garage, driveway with a car, and landscaped front yard.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the garage side, side windows, and a glimpse of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the backyard with a swimming pool, patio, balcony, and large rear-facing windows.
description_view_3: Right side view showing the garage, driveway, side yard, and more of the backyard amenities including trees and lounge chairs.
attribute_architectural_style: Transitional (mix of Colonial and Modern elements)
attribute_window_arrangement: symmetrical rows with large picture windows and some asymmetrical placements
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a covered porch with columns, steps leading up, and a single front door flanked by windows.
